# Summary
- What changed:
- Why this change is needed:

# Type Of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CI/Tooling
- [ ] Breaking change

# Validation
- [ ] `npm run secrets:scan`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- Result summary:

# Risk And Rollback
- Risk level: `low` | `medium` | `high`
- Rollback plan:

# Compatibility
- [ ] Tool/API contract unchanged, or documented
- [ ] Breaking changes noted in `CHANGELOG.md` (if applicable)
- [ ] Migration notes added (if applicable)

# Documentation
- [ ] Updated docs affected by this change (`README.md`, `docs/`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, `SECURITY.md`)

# Checklist
- [ ] PR is focused and reversible
- [ ] No unrelated churn
- [ ] Linked issue/task (if available)
